author: Imed Ghomari
description: Adds configurable Templater-powered buttons to Obsidian Bases. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Imed Ghomari
manifest.description: Adds configurable Templater-powered buttons to Bases.
manifest.name: Bases Buttons

name: Bases Buttons

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bases Buttons 1.2.3

## Fixes

- Fixed mobile confirmation dialogs closing immediately after a button tap.
- Kept backdrop taps from dismissing the mobile run confirmation, so users must choose Cancel or Run.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bases Buttons 1.2.2

## Fixes

- Restored the earlier simpler button styling so labels match Bases more closely.
- Updated plugin author metadata to Imed Ghomari.
- Added README credit for the original Custom Selectors plugin by hodie.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bases Buttons 1.2.1

## Fixes

- Removed hover tooltip text from Bases buttons.
- Matched button label sizing to the surrounding Bases cell text.
- Added direct cell-level Enter handling so selected button cells run on the first Enter press.
- Added stronger cell-level pointer guards so button presses do not also activate Bases cell selection.

## Notes

- Bases undo/redo integration is not included because the public plugin API does not expose the core Bases edit transaction stack, and button actions run arbitrary Templater scripts against files.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bases Buttons 1.2.0

## Changes

- Added mobile-only run confirmation, enabled by default, to reduce accidental touch activation.
- Added Enter-key activation for selected button cells while navigating Bases with the keyboard.
- Added earlier pointer/touch event guards so button presses do not also trigger Bases cell selection.
- Kept button styling on Obsidian CSS variables so it follows light and dark themes.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bases Buttons 1.1.0

## Changes

- Buttons now render only in Bases tables, not in note frontmatter Properties.
- Added template file suggestions in settings when choosing the Templater file path.
- Hardened Bases button activation so clicks run the configured template instead of selecting the Base row.
- Button activation targets the note represented by the clicked Base row.

## Fixes

- Keeps the scoped DOM injection fix from 1.0.2 to avoid the previous Bases column freeze.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bases Buttons 1.0.1

## Fixes

- Fixed a DOM mutation loop that could make Obsidian unresponsive after adding a `button.<name>` property in frontmatter or as a Bases column.
- Button updates now skip DOM writes when the rendered label, template path, title, and aria label are already current.
- Bases buttons now resolve the row note at click time so late-rendered row links still target the correct file.

## Release

- Added a GitHub Actions release workflow that builds the plugin and uploads `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` when a version tag is pushed.
